title: GG Mock 19 — Full Syllabus High Difficulty

questions.subject: General Aptitude
questions.stem: Fill in the blank: 'Although the project was delayed, the team remained ____ about meeting the final deadline.'
questions.solution:
**Concept.** 'Although' sets up a contrast: despite a setback, a positive attitude persisted.

**Working.** The contrast with the delay calls for a positive word — 'optimistic'.

**Answer.** optimistic.

questions.subject: General Aptitude
questions.stem: Compute the average of the four bar values shown: $4, 6, 8, 10$.

figure.caption: Bar chart of four values
figure.markup: <svg viewBox='0 0 220 150' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><line x1='30' y1='120' x2='210' y2='120' stroke='#475569'/><g fill='#bfdbfe' stroke='#475569'><rect x='45' y='90' width='25' height='30'/><rect x='85' y='75' width='25' height='45'/><rect x='125' y='60' width='25' height='60'/><rect x='165' y='45' width='25' height='75'/></g><text x='55' y='138' font-size='8'>4, 6, 8, 10</text></svg>

questions.subject: General Aptitude
questions.stem: A is three times as old as B, and the sum of their ages is $48$ years. A's age is _____ years.
questions.solution:
**Concept.** Express both ages in one variable.

**Working.** $A=3B$ and $A+B=48\Rightarrow 4B=48\Rightarrow B=12,\;A=36$.

**Answer.** $36$ years.

questions.subject: General Aptitude
questions.stem: The average of $10, 20, 30, 40$ and $50$ is _____ .

questions.subject: General Aptitude
questions.stem: The least common multiple (LCM) of $6$ and $8$ is _____ .
questions.solution:
**Concept.** LCM is the product of all prime factors at highest powers.

**Working.** $6=2\cdot 3$, $8=2^3$; LCM $=2^3\cdot 3=24$.

**Answer.** $24$.

questions.subject: General Aptitude
questions.stem: P is the father of Q. Q is the sister of R. S is the mother of R. How is P related to S?
questions.solution:
**Concept.** Identify shared children to fix the spousal link.

**Working.** P fathers Q and R; S mothers R (and Q). Sharing the same children, P and S are spouses, so P is the husband of S.

**Answer.** Husband.

questions.subject: General Aptitude
questions.stem: The plus-shaped net shown is folded into a cube. Which face is opposite face 1?

figure.caption: A plus-shaped cube net: face 1 on top, faces 2, 3, 4 in the middle row, face 5 below 3, and face 6 below 5.
figure.markup: <svg viewBox='0 0 200 220' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' role='img'><g stroke='#334155' stroke-width='2' fill='rgba(99,102,241,0.08)'><rect x='70' y='20' width='40' height='40'/><rect x='30' y='60' width='40' height='40'/><rect x='70' y='60' width='40' height='40'/><rect x='110' y='60' width='40' height='40'/><rect x='70' y='100' width='40' height='40'/><rect x='70' y='140' width='40' height='40'/></g><g font-size='16' fill='#334155'><text x='86' y='45'>1</text><text x='46' y='85'>2</text><text x='86' y='85'>3</text><text x='126' y='85'>4</text><text x='86' y='125'>5</text><text x='86' y='165'>6</text></g></svg>

questions.solution:
**Concept.** Fold the vertical strip 1-3-5-6; the faces one step apart along the fold become front/back, top/bottom.

**Working.** Taking 3 as the front, 1 folds to the top and 5 to the bottom, so 1 is opposite 5.

**Answer.** 5.

questions.subject: General Aptitude
questions.stem: The number of positive divisors of $36$ is
questions.solution:
**Concept.** For $N=p^a q^b$, the divisor count is $(a+1)(b+1)$.

**Working.** $36=2^2\cdot 3^2$, so $(2+1)(2+1)=9$.

**Answer.** $9$.

questions.subject: General Aptitude
questions.stem: The length of the diagonal of a rectangle of sides $8$ and $6$ is
questions.solution:
**Concept.** The diagonal is the hypotenuse of a right triangle with the two sides as legs.

**Working.** $\sqrt{8^2+6^2}=\sqrt{100}=10$.

**Answer.** $10$.

questions.subject: Applied Geology · Remote Sensing & GIS
questions.stem: The ability of a sensor to distinguish two adjacent objects on the ground is its
questions.solution:
**Concept.** Spatial resolution = smallest resolvable ground detail.

**Working.**
Spatial resolution.

**Answer.** Spatial resolution

questions.subject: Structural Geology
questions.stem: A planar fault strikes $60^\circ$ and dips $35^\circ$. The plunge of the true-dip line (steepest line on the plane) is _____ degrees.
questions.solution:
**Concept.** The true-dip line plunges at the dip angle, in the dip direction.

**Working.**
$$\text{plunge}=\text{dip}=35^\circ.$$

**Answer.** $35^\circ$

questions.subject: Mineralogy & Crystallography
questions.stem: Which minerals are isotropic under crossed polars (remain dark on rotation)?
questions.solution:
**Concept.** Isotropic = cubic minerals (garnet, spinel, halite). Quartz is uniaxial (anisotropic).

**Working.**
Garnet, spinel, halite.

**Answer.** Isotropic minerals
